properties.body:
BRAZIL-NORTH COAST.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V HAWK EXPLORER TOWING
   5.4 MILE LONG CABLE:
   A. IN PROGRESS ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      01-32.40S 038-35.80W AND 02-27.95S 039-18.63W.
   B. 12 MAR ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      01-28.50S 038-19.15W AND 02-36.30S 039-11.40W.
   C. 13 MAR ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      01-45.67S 038-18.72W AND 02-44.22S 039-03.85W.
   D. 14 MAR ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      01-52.33S 038-10.20W AND 02-52.00S 038-56.20W.
   E. 15 MAR ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      01-59.47S 038-02.05W AND 02-58.87S 038-47.82W.
   SEVEN MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 557/12.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 16 MAR.
